items.description: RIG portfolio gained 12.97% in 2025, matching the Dow with a 6.29% forward yield.

items.title: Blaze Pizza names McDonald’s, Subway alum as CEO
items.description: John Owen is tasked with improving the shrinking chain’s menu and operations to insulate it from the fast casual pizza sector struggles.

items.title: McDonald's Rival Jollibee Foods Eyes US Listing Of International Business By 2027
items.description: Jollibee Foods Corp. (OTC: JBFCY) announced plans on Tuesday to separate its international business and list it in the U.S. by late 2027.

items.title: McDonald’s Rival Jollibee Plans US Listing for Global Business
items.description: Jollibee Foods Corporation International would include all of the company’s businesses outside its home market, the company said in a statement filed to the Philippine Stock Exchange, where its Philippine operations will remain listed.  The spinoff would allow investors to value the “stable, cash-generative Philippine business separately from the higher-growth but more volatile international operations,” COL Financial Group analyst Rachelle Biacora said in a note.  Jollibee shareholders would receive a number of shares in the international business equal to their company holdings at the time of the listing, the company said.
